column7176: \"canUpgrade\":{\"title\":\"Can I upgrade from the Starter to the Growth plan?\"
column7177: \"message\":\"Yes. You can upgrade from the Starter to the Growth plans. When you go from the Starter to the Growth plan
column7178: the change is instantaneous and you are charged pro rata for the days remaining before the next billing cycle. For example
column7179: if your billing period is the 5th of each month
column7180: and you upgrade to the Growth plan on the 1st
column7181: you are billed with the subscription amount difference for the remaining 5 days.\"}
column7182: \"canDowngrade\":{\"title\":\"Can I downgrade from the Growth to the Starter plan?\"
column7183: \"message\":\"Yes. You can downgrade from the Growth to the Starter plans. When you downgrade
column7184: the changes are effective at the end of the billing cycle. For example if your billing period is the 5th each month
column7185: and you downgrade to the Starter plan on the 1st
column7186: you will stay on the Growth plan until the 5th.\"}

You can download sample CSV files here for testing purposes. The datasets can be used in any software application compatible with CSV files. An easy tool to edit CSV files online is our CSV Editor.
Five datasets are available:
Customers - Download
People - Download
Organizations - Download
Leads - Download
Products - Download

For each dataset, several CSV sizes are available, from 100 to 2 million records. The first line contains the CSV headers. An index column is set on each file. Rows have an index value which is incremental and starts at 1 for the first data row.
All datasets are free to download and play with. All the data is random and those files must only be used for testing.
The script used to generate all those CSV files is open source and available on Github.
